title: On a Fractional Schr\"odinger equation in the presence of Harmonic   potential
summary:
In this paper, we establish the existence of ground state solutions for a
fractional Schr\"odinger equation in the presence of a harmonic trapping
potential. We also address the orbital stability of standing waves.
Additionally, we provide interesting numerical results about the dynamics and
compare them with other types of Schr\"odinger equations. Our results explain
the effect of each term of the Schr\"odinger equation : The fractional power,
the power of the nonlinearity and the harmonic potential.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有谐振势的分数阶薛定谔方程基态解的存在性，并研究了驻波的轨道稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究具有谐振势的分数阶薛定谔方程，该方程结合了分数阶拉普拉斯算子、非线性项和谐振势，是量子力学和凝聚态物理中的重要模型。
AI.techniques: 变分方法、集中紧性原理、能量泛函分析、数值模拟技术。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了基态解的存在性定理和驻波的轨道稳定性结果。
AI.significance: 阐明了分数阶幂次、非线性项幂次和谐振势对薛定谔方程解行为的影响，为分数阶量子系统提供了理论基础。

title: Analysis and spectral theory of neck-stretching problems
comment:
53 pages. Typos fixed and mentions of H\"older norms removed to
  clarify exposition. Minor mistake in the proof of Theorem 2.9 corrected in
  Section 3. Proof of Corollary 5.3 added
summary:
We study the mapping properties of a large class of elliptic operators $P_T$
in gluing problems where two non-compact manifolds with asymptotically
cylindrical geometry are glued along a neck of length $2T$. In the limit where
$T \rightarrow \infty$, we reduce the question of constructing approximate
solutions of $P_T u = f$ to a finite-dimensional linear system, and provide a
geometric interpretation of the obstructions to solving this system. Under some
assumptions on the real roots of the model operator $P_0$ on the cylinder, we
construct a Fredholm inverse for $P_T$ with good control on the growth of its
norm. As applications of our method, we study the decay rate and density of the
low eigenvalues of the Laplacian acting on differential forms, and give
improved estimates for compact $G_2$-manifolds constructed by twisted connected
sum. We relate our results to the swampland distance conjectures in physics.

AI.tldr: 研究渐近柱面流形粘合问题中椭圆算子的映射性质，建立Fredholm逆并应用于Laplace算子低特征值估计和G_2流形构造
AI.motivation: 研究两个具有渐近柱面几何的非紧流形通过长度为2T的颈部粘合时椭圆算子的性质，特别是当T→∞时的极限行为，这类问题在几何分析和物理弦论中都有重要应用
AI.techniques: 使用渐近分析、Fredholm理论、有限维约化方法，将大T极限下的近似解构造问题转化为有限维线性系统，并给出几何解释
AI.main_theorems: 在模型算子P_0实根假设下，为P_T构造具有范数增长控制的Fredholm逆；应用于微分形式上Laplace算子的低特征值衰减率和密度估计，以及扭曲连通和构造的紧G_2流形的改进估计
AI.significance: 为几何粘合问题提供系统分析框架，连接数学几何分析与物理弦论中的沼泽地距离猜想，在特殊几何构造和谱理论中有重要应用

title: Heat equations associated to harmonic oscillator with exponential   nonlinearity
comment: To appear in Annals of Functional Analysis
summary:
We investigate the Cauchy problem for a heat equation involving a fractional
harmonic oscillator and an exponential nonlinearity. We establish local
well-posedness within the appropriate Orlicz spaces. Through the examination of
small initial data in suitable Orlicz spaces, we obtain the existence of global
weak-mild solutions. Additionally, precise decay estimates are presented for
large time, indicating that the decay rate is influenced by the nonlinearity's
behavior near the origin. Moreover, we highlight that the existence of local
nonnegative classical solutions is no longer guaranteed when certain
nonnegative initial data is considered within the appropriate Orlicz space.

AI.tldr: 研究分数阶谐振子热方程在指数非线性下的适定性、全局解存在性和衰减估计
AI.motivation: 研究分数阶谐振子热方程（涉及分数阶拉普拉斯算子与谐振子势能）在指数非线性下的Cauchy问题，探索Orlicz空间中解的适定性、全局存在性和长时间行为
AI.techniques: 使用Orlicz空间理论、分数阶谐振子半群估计、弱-温和解方法、衰减估计技术、小初值分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在适当Orlicz空间中的局部适定性；2. 小初值条件下全局弱-温和解的存在性；3. 大时间衰减估计，显示衰减率受非线性在原点附近行为影响；4. 某些非负初值在适当Orlicz空间中不再保证局部非负经典解存在
AI.significance: 扩展了分数阶谐振子方程理论，建立了指数非线性下的适定性框架，揭示了非线性在原点附近行为对解长时间衰减的影响，为研究奇异非线性抛物方程提供了新视角

title: A note on the Long-Time behaviour of Stochastic McKean-Vlasov Equations   with common noise
summary:
This paper focuses on the long-term behavior of solutions to nonlinear
stochastic Fokker-Planck equations driven by common noise, where the drift term
has a linear dependence on the measure. These equations, which describe the
evolution of probability distributions, naturally arise in the mean-field limit
of interacting particle systems driven by both idiosyncratic and common noises.
After proving the existence of an invariant measure under some mild conditions,
we first consider the case where the confinement potential is uniformly convex.
In this setting, we establish a result of uniform-in-time conditional
propagation of chaos for the associated particle system. This result directly
implies the uniqueness of the long-term behavior for solutions of the nonlinear
stochastic Fokker-Planck equation. Then, we highlight a more surprising
phenomenon of uniqueness recovery induced by the addition of common noise in
the non-convex case, albeit under more restrictive structural assumptions.
Specifically, we show that the presence of common noise leads to uniqueness and
exponential convergence towards equilibrium in the absence of idiosyncratic
noise. This result emphasizes the stabilizing role of common noise in systems
where non-convex potentials would typically allow for multiple invariant
measures.

AI.tldr: 证明了带有共同噪声的非线性随机Fokker-Planck方程在一致凸势下具有一致传播混沌性，并在非凸势下揭示了共同噪声诱导唯一性的稳定化现象。
AI.motivation: 研究由共同噪声驱动的非线性随机Fokker-Planck方程的长时行为，这类方程描述概率分布的演化，自然出现在同时受个体噪声和共同噪声驱动的相互作用粒子系统的平均场极限中。
AI.techniques: 随机分析、平均场极限理论、传播混沌方法、不变测度理论、凸性分析、共同噪声的稳定化效应分析。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在温和条件下证明不变测度的存在性；2. 在一致凸约束势下建立关联粒子系统的一致时间条件传播混沌结果；3. 在非凸情况下，证明共同噪声的加入能恢复唯一性，并在无个体噪声时展示指数收敛到平衡态。
AI.significance: 揭示了共同噪声在随机平均场系统中的稳定化作用，为理解噪声诱导唯一性现象提供了理论框架，对随机动力学和统计物理中的相变问题有重要启示。

title: Non-local boundary energy forms for quasidiscs: Codimension gap and   approximation
summary:
We consider non-local energy forms of fractional Laplace type on quasicircles
and prove that they can be approximated by similar energy forms on polygonal
curves. The approximation is in terms of generalized Mosco convergence along a
sequence of varying Hilbert spaces. The domains of the energy forms are the
natural trace spaces, and we focus on the case of quasicircles of Hausdorff
dimension greater than one. The jump in Hausdorff dimension results in a
mismatch of fractional orders, which we compensate by a suitable choice of
kernels. We provide approximations of quasidiscs by polygonal
$(\varepsilon,\infty)$-domains with common parameter $\varepsilon>0$ and show
convergence results for superpositions of Dirichlet integrals and non-local
boundary energy forms.

AI.tldr: 证明了分式拉普拉斯型非局部能量形式在拟圆上的Mosco收敛性，通过多边形曲线逼近，解决了豪斯多夫维数大于1时的阶数不匹配问题。
AI.motivation: 研究拟圆上分式拉普拉斯型非局部能量形式的逼近问题，特别是当拟圆的豪斯多夫维数大于1时，传统的逼近方法因维数跳跃导致阶数不匹配而失效。
AI.techniques: 使用广义Mosco收敛理论、变希尔伯特空间序列、核函数选择补偿阶数不匹配、多边形$(\varepsilon,\infty)$-域逼近拟圆、狄利克雷积分与非局部边界能量形式的叠加。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了非局部能量形式在拟圆上可通过多边形曲线上的类似能量形式逼近，建立了广义Mosco收敛性，解决了豪斯多夫维数大于1时的阶数不匹配问题。
AI.significance: 为非局部能量形式在分形边界上的研究提供了新的逼近框架，扩展了Mosco收敛理论的应用范围，为分形几何与偏微分方程的交叉研究提供了重要工具。

title: Dynamic Scheduling of a Multiclass Queue in the Halfin-Whitt Regime: A   Computational Approach for High-Dimensional Problems
summary:
We consider a multi-class queueing model of a telephone call center, in which
a system manager dynamically allocates available servers to customer calls.
Calls can terminate through either service completion or customer abandonment,
and the manager strives to minimize the expected total of holding costs plus
abandonment costs over a finite horizon. Focusing on the Halfin-Whitt heavy
traffic regime, we derive an approximating diffusion control problem, and
building on earlier work by Beck et al. (2021), develop a simulation-based
computational method for solution of such problems, one that relies heavily on
deep neural network technology. Using this computational method, we propose a
policy for the original (pre-limit) call center scheduling problem. Finally,
the performance of this policy is assessed using test problems based on
publicly available call center data. For the test problems considered so far,
our policy does as well as or better than the best benchmark we could find.
Moreover, our method is computationally feasible at least up to dimension 500,
that is, for call centers with 500 or more distinct customer classes.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于深度神经网络和扩散近似的呼叫中心多类排队系统动态调度策略计算方法
AI.motivation: 研究电话呼叫中心的多类排队系统，系统管理员需要动态分配服务器资源，客户呼叫可能通过服务完成或客户放弃终止，目标是在有限时间范围内最小化持有成本和放弃成本的总期望值
AI.techniques: 采用Halfin-Whitt重负载渐近理论推导扩散近似控制问题，基于Beck等人(2021)的工作，开发基于深度神经网络的仿真计算方法，用于求解高维扩散控制问题
AI.main_theorems: 提出了基于扩散近似的呼叫中心调度策略计算方法，该方法在维度高达500（即500个以上不同客户类别）的情况下计算可行，在测试问题中表现优于或等于现有最佳基准
AI.significance: 将深度神经网络技术应用于排队系统控制问题，为高维呼叫中心调度提供了计算可行的解决方案，对运营管理、服务系统优化具有重要应用价值

title: Increasing resolution and instability for linear inverse scattering   problems
summary:
In this work we study the increasing resolution of linear inverse scattering
problems at a large fixed frequency. We consider the problem of recovering the
density of a Herglotz wave function, and the linearized inverse scattering
problem for a potential. It is shown that the number of features that can be
stably recovered (stable region) becomes larger as the frequency increases,
whereas one has strong instability for the rest of the features (unstable
region). To show this rigorously, we prove that the singular values of the
forward operator stay roughly constant in the stable region and decay
exponentially in the unstable region. The arguments are based on structural
properties of the problems and they involve the Courant min-max principle for
singular values, quantitative Agmon-H\"ormander estimates, and a Schwartz
kernel computation based on the coarea formula.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了线性逆散射问题在高频下的分辨率极限，揭示了稳定可恢复特征数量随频率增加而增大的现象
AI.motivation: 研究高频条件下线性逆散射问题的分辨率极限，特别是Herglotz波函数密度恢复和势函数线性化逆散射问题，旨在理解频率增加时信息恢复能力的理论界限
AI.techniques: 使用Courant min-max原理分析奇异值，定量Agmon-Hörmander估计，以及基于余面积公式的Schwartz核计算
AI.main_theorems: 证明了前向算子的奇异值在稳定区域大致保持常数，在不稳定区域呈指数衰减，从而严格证明了可稳定恢复的特征数量随频率增加而增大
AI.significance: 为高频逆散射问题提供了严格的理论框架，揭示了分辨率与频率之间的定量关系，对波传播成像和反问题理论有重要贡献

title: Interior Harnack inequality and H\"older estimates for linearized   Monge-Amp\`ere equations in divergence form with drift
comment:
Final version to appear in Calculus of Variations and Partial
  Differential Equations
summary:
In this paper, we study interior estimates for solutions to linearized
Monge-Amp\`ere equations in divergence form with drift terms and the right-hand
side containing the divergence of a bounded vector field. Equations of this
type appear in the study of semigeostrophic equations in meteorology and the
solvability of singular Abreu equations in the calculus of variations with a
convexity constraint. We prove an interior Harnack inequality and H\"older
estimates for solutions to equations of this type in two dimensions, and under
an integrability assumption on the Hessian matrix of the Monge-Amp\`ere
potential in higher dimensions. Our results extend those of Le (Analysis of
Monge-Amp\`ere equations, Graduate Studies in Mathematics, vol.240, American
Mathematical Society, 2024) to equations with drift terms.

AI.tldr: 将Le的线性化蒙日-安培方程内估计推广到包含漂移项和散度项右端的情形
AI.motivation: 研究具有漂移项的线性化蒙日-安培方程的内估计，这类方程出现在气象学中的半地转方程和变分法中具有凸性约束的奇异Abreu方程的可解性研究中
AI.techniques: 使用蒙日-安培势的Hessian矩阵可积性假设，在二维和更高维空间中建立Harnack不等式和Hölder估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了二维情况下此类方程的Harnack不等式和Hölder估计，在高维情况下在蒙日-安培势的Hessian矩阵满足可积性假设下得到类似结果
AI.significance: 扩展了Le关于线性化蒙日-安培方程的结果，为气象学和变分法中的相关应用提供了理论基础，处理了更一般的方程形式

title: Upper bounds on the dimension of the global attractor of the 2D   Navier-Stokes equations on the $\beta-$plane
summary:
This article establishes estimates on the dimension of the global attractor
of the two-dimensional rotating Navier-Stokes equation for viscous,
incompressible fluids on the $\beta$-plane. Previous results in this setting by
M.A.H. Al-Jaboori and D. Wirosoetisno (2011) had proved that the global
attractor collapses to a single point that depends only the longitudinal
coordinate, i.e., zonal flow, when the rotation is sufficiently fast. However,
an explicit quantification of the complexity of the global attractor in terms
of $\beta$ had remained open. In this paper, such estimates are established
which are valid across a wide regime of rotation rates and are consistent with
the dynamically degenerate regime previously identified. Additionally, a
decomposition of solutions is established detailing the asymptotic behavior of
the solutions in the limit of large rotation.

AI.tldr: 建立了二维旋转Navier-Stokes方程全局吸引子维度的显式估计，量化了β平面旋转流体系统的复杂性
AI.motivation: 研究二维β平面上旋转Navier-Stokes方程的全局吸引子维度估计问题。先前Al-Jaboori和Wirosoetisno(2011)证明了当旋转足够快时，全局吸引子坍缩为仅依赖于经度坐标的带状流，但缺乏对吸引子复杂性的显式量化。本文旨在填补这一空白，建立关于β的显式估计。
AI.techniques: 使用全局吸引子理论、旋转流体动力学分析、渐近展开方法，建立了在广泛旋转速率范围内的维度估计，并与先前识别的动力学退化机制保持一致
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了二维旋转Navier-Stokes方程全局吸引子维度的显式估计，量化了β参数的影响；2) 建立了解的分解，详细描述了在大旋转极限下解的渐近行为
AI.significance: 首次提供了旋转流体系统全局吸引子复杂性的显式量化，深化了对β平面旋转Navier-Stokes方程动力学行为的理解，为地球物理流体动力学中的旋转效应提供了严格的数学分析框架

title: Derivation of the compressible Euler equations from the dynamics of   interacting Bose gas in the hard-core limit regime
summary:
We investigate the dynamics of short-range interacting Bose gases with
varying degrees of diluteness and interaction strength. By applying a combined
mean-field and semiclassical space-time rescaling to the dynamics in both the
Gross--Pitaevskii and hard-core limit regimes, we prove that the local
one-particle mass, momentum, and energy densities of the many-body system can
be quantitatively approximated by solutions to the compressible Euler system in
the strong sense, up to the first blow-up time of the fluid description, as the
number of particles tends to infinity. In the hard-core limit regime, two novel
results are presented. First, we rigorously prove, for the first time, that the
internal energy of the fluid takes the form $4\pi \mathfrak{c}_{0}\rho^{2}$
(equivalently, pressure $P=2\pi \mathfrak{c}_{0}\rho^{2}$), arising solely from
the kinetic energy density of the many-body system, rather than the interaction
energy density, marking a fundamental difference from the Gross--Pitaevskii and
other mean-field regimes. Second, the newly discovered coupling constant
$\mathfrak{c}_{0}$ is the electrostatic capacity of the interaction potential,
corresponding to the scattering length of the hard-core potential. Furthermore,
in other limiting regimes, including those beyond the Gross--Pitaevskii regime,
we find that the limiting equation is described by an eikonal system, offering
a rigorous first-principle justification for using the ``geometric optics
approximation'' to describe the dynamics of ultracold Bose gases.

AI.tldr: 证明了短程相互作用玻色气体在多种极限下的动力学可由可压缩欧拉系统定量描述，并在硬核极限下首次严格推导出流体内部能量的新形式。
AI.motivation: 研究具有不同稀释度和相互作用强度的短程相互作用玻色气体的动力学，旨在建立从量子多体系统到经典流体力学方程的严格数学联系。
AI.techniques: 结合平均场和半经典时空重标度方法，应用于Gross-Pitaevskii和硬核极限两种机制，使用多体量子力学到流体力学方程的定量逼近技术。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 在粒子数趋于无穷时，多体系统的局域单粒子质量、动量和能量密度可由可压缩欧拉系统强意义下定量逼近；2. 在硬核极限下首次严格证明流体内部能量形式为4πc₀ρ²，其中c₀为相互作用势的静电容量；3. 在其他极限机制下发现极限方程由eikonal系统描述。
AI.significance: 为超冷玻色气体的几何光学近似提供了严格的第一性原理证明，揭示了硬核极限下流体能量来源的本质差异，建立了量子多体系统与经典流体力学之间的数学桥梁。

title: Reaction-diffusion model for a population structured in phenotype and   space I -- Criterion for persistence
summary:
We consider a reaction-diffusion model for a population structured in
phenotype. We assume that the population lives in a heterogeneous periodic
environment, so that a given phenotypic trait may be more or less fit according
to the spatial location. The model features spatial mobility of individuals as
well as mutation.
  We first prove the well-posedness of the model. Next, we derive a criterion
for the persistence of the population which involves the generalised principal
eigenvalue associated with the linearised elliptic operator. This notion allows
us to handle the possible lack of coercivity of the operator. We then obtain a
monotonicity result for the generalised principal eigenvalue, in terms of the
frequency of spatial fluctuations of the environment and in terms of the
spatial diffusivity. We deduce that the more heterogeneous is the environment,
or the higher is the mobility of individuals, the harder is the persistence for
the species.
  This work lays the mathematical foundation to investigate some other
optimisation problems for the environment to make persistence as hard or as
easy as possible, which will be addressed in the forthcoming companion paper.

AI.tldr: 建立了表型结构种群在异质周期环境中的反应-扩散模型，分析了种群持久性的数学判据及其与环境异质性和个体迁移率的关系。
AI.motivation: 研究表型结构种群在空间异质环境中的演化动态，其中表型适应性随空间位置变化，个体具有空间迁移和突变能力，旨在理解环境异质性和个体迁移如何影响种群持久性。
AI.techniques: 使用反应-扩散方程建模，引入广义主特征值处理非强制性算子，通过单调性分析研究环境波动频率和空间扩散率对持久性的影响。
AI.main_theorems: 证明了模型的适定性，建立了基于线性化椭圆算子广义主特征值的种群持久性判据，获得了广义主特征值关于环境波动频率和空间扩散率的单调性结果。
AI.significance: 为研究环境异质性和个体迁移对种群持久性的影响提供了严格的数学框架，为后续优化环境设计以最大化或最小化种群持久性的问题奠定了基础。

title: Existence of Positive Solution for a System of Quasilinear Schrodinger
comment:
We found published version of this work in the thesis titled
  "Exist\^encia de Solu\c{c}\~ao Positiva para uma Classe de Equa\c{c}\~ao de
  Schrodinger Quasilineares em RN" here's the link to access it for complete
  calculations
  https://pdm.propesp.ufpa.br/ARQUIVOS/teses/2022/Tese%20Laila%20Concei%C3%A7%C3%A3o%20Fontinele.pdf
summary:
We investigate the existence of standing wave solutions for quasilinear
Schrodinger systems. To address the challenges posed by non differentiability,
we adopt the dual approach introduced by Colin and Jeanjean. The existence of
solutions is established using Del Pino and Felmer's penalization technique,
with refinements inspired by Alves' arguments.

AI.tldr: 采用对偶方法和惩罚技术研究了拟线性薛定谔系统的驻波解存在性
AI.motivation: 研究拟线性薛定谔系统的驻波解存在性问题，这类系统由于非线性项导致泛函不可微，需要特殊处理
AI.techniques: 采用Colin和Jeanjean的对偶方法处理不可微性，结合Del Pino和Felmer的惩罚技术，并借鉴Alves的论证进行改进
AI.main_theorems: 建立了拟线性薛定谔系统驻波解的存在性结果
AI.significance: 为拟线性薛定谔系统理论提供了新的存在性结果，扩展了对偶方法和惩罚技术在非线性PDE中的应用

title: Regularity estimates to quasi-linear parabolic equations in   non-divergence form with non-homogeneous signature
summary:
In this manuscript, we establish the existence and sharp geometric regularity
estimates for bounded solutions of a class of quasilinear parabolic equations
in non-divergence form with non-homogeneous degeneracy. The model equation in
this class is given by \[ \partial_{t} u = \left(|\nabla u|^{\mathfrak{p}} +
\mathfrak{a}(x, t)|\nabla u|^{\mathfrak{q}}\right)\Delta_{p}^{\mathrm{N}} u +
f(x, t) \quad \text{in} \quad Q_1 = B_1 \times (-1, 0], \] where $p \in (1,
\infty)$, $\mathfrak{p}, \mathfrak{q} \in [0, \infty)$, and $\mathfrak{a}, f:
Q_1 \to \mathbb{R}$ are suitably defined functions. Our approach is based on
geometric tangential methods, incorporating a refined oscillation mechanism,
compactness arguments, ``alternative methods,'' and scaling techniques.
Furthermore, we derive pointwise estimates in settings exhibiting
singular-degenerate or doubly singular signatures. To some extent, our
regularity estimates refine and extend previous results from \cite{FZ23}
through distinct methodological advancements. Finally, we explore connections
between our findings and fundamental nonlinear models in the theory of
quasilinear PDEs, which may be of independent interest.

AI.tldr: 建立了非散度形式非齐次退化拟线性抛物方程有界解的存在性和尖锐几何正则性估计
AI.motivation: 研究一类具有非齐次退化特性的拟线性抛物方程，这类方程包含奇异-退化或双重奇异特征，在非线性PDE理论中具有基础重要性
AI.techniques: 几何切向方法、改进的振荡机制、紧致性论证、"替代方法"、尺度变换技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了有界解的存在性和尖锐几何正则性估计，在奇异-退化或双重奇异情形下推导了点态估计，改进了先前文献的结果
AI.significance: 扩展了拟线性抛物方程正则性理论，为具有非齐次退化特征的方程提供了新的分析框架，与基础非线性模型建立了联系

title: Partial Differential Operators and Fourier Integral Operators in the   Gevrey setting and applications
summary:
We state and prove here semiclassical results about the construction of
asymptotic solutions by the WKB method for pseudo-differential equations of
real principal type. It is a Gevrey version; the smooth $C^\infty$ and the
analytic ones may be found in H\"ormander (Hormander1985) and Sj\"ostrand
(Sj\"ostrand1982). We present here three versions depending on the degree of
entrance in the complex domain.

AI.tldr: 提出了伪微分方程WKB渐近解的Gevrey版本，补充了Hörmander和Sjöstrand的C^∞和解析版本
AI.motivation: 研究实主型伪微分方程的WKB渐近解构造，已有Hörmander的C^∞版本和Sjöstrand的解析版本，本文旨在建立Gevrey版本的相应理论
AI.techniques: WKB方法、Gevrey函数理论、复域延拓技术、伪微分算子理论、实主型方程分析
AI.main_theorems: 建立了实主型伪微分方程WKB渐近解的Gevrey版本，根据复域延拓程度给出了三种不同版本的结果
AI.significance: 填补了C^∞和解析版本之间的理论空白，为Gevrey类方程提供了渐近分析工具，扩展了WKB方法的应用范围

title: Global weak solutions for a variation of the Whitham equation
summary:
We study in this article a variation of the Whitham equation which was
introduced as an alternative to the KdV equation. We first prove the global
existence of weak solutions, then we establish a regularity criterion from
which we deduce the uniqueness of weak solutions. Local in time criterions for
regularity and uniqueness are also given.

AI.tldr: 证明了Whitham方程变体弱解的全局存在性、正则性准则和唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究Whitham方程的变体，该方程作为KdV方程的替代模型，旨在建立其弱解的基本理论框架
AI.techniques: 使用弱解理论、正则性准则方法、存在性证明和唯一性分析技术
AI.main_theorems: 1. 弱解的全局存在性定理；2. 正则性准则（由此推导出弱解的唯一性）；3. 局部时间正则性和唯一性准则
AI.significance: 为Whitham方程变体建立了完整的弱解理论，为这类非线性色散波方程的数学分析提供了理论基础

title: Time derivative estimates for parabolic $p$-Laplace equations and   applications to optimal regularity
summary:
We establish the boundedness of time derivatives of solutions to parabolic
$p$-Laplace equations. Our approach relies on the Bernstein technique combined
with a suitable approximation method. As a consequence, we obtain an optimal
regularity result with a connection to the well-known $C^{p'}$-conjecture in
the elliptic setting. Finally, we extend our method to treat global regularity
results for both fully nonlinear and general quasilinear degenerate parabolic
problems.

AI.tldr: 建立了抛物型p-Laplace方程解的时间导数的有界性，并获得了最优正则性结果
AI.motivation: 研究抛物型p-Laplace方程解的正则性问题，特别是时间导数的有界性，这与椭圆情形下著名的C^{p'}-猜想相关
AI.techniques: Bernstein技术与适当的逼近方法相结合，并将方法推广到完全非线性和一般拟线性退化抛物问题
AI.main_theorems: 建立了抛物型p-Laplace方程解的时间导数有界性，获得了最优正则性结果，并推广到完全非线性和一般拟线性退化抛物问题的全局正则性
AI.significance: 为抛物型p-Laplace方程提供了重要的正则性理论，建立了与椭圆情形C^{p'}-猜想的联系，并将方法推广到更广泛的退化抛物问题

title: Stable blowup for supercritical wave maps into perturbed spheres
summary:
We consider wave maps from $(1+d)$-dimensional Minkowski space, $d\geq3$,
into rotationally symmetric manifolds which arise from small perturbations of
the sphere $\mathbb S^d$. We prove the existence of co-rotational self-similar
finite time blowup solutions with smooth blowup profiles. Furthermore, we show
the nonlinear asymptotic stability of these solutions under suitably small
co-rotational perturbations on the full space.

AI.tldr: 证明了在(1+d)维Minkowski时空中，存在旋转对称自相似有限时间爆破解，并建立了其在适当小扰动下的非线性渐近稳定性。
AI.motivation: 研究从(1+d)维Minkowski空间到旋转对称流形的波映射方程，这些流形是球面$\mathbb S^d$的小扰动。关注有限时间爆破现象，特别是自相似爆破解的存在性和稳定性问题。
AI.techniques: 采用共旋转对称性简化问题，使用自相似变量变换，通过构造性方法建立爆破解的存在性，并运用非线性稳定性分析技术研究扰动下的渐近行为。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 存在性定理：证明了共旋转自相似有限时间爆破解的存在性，且爆破剖面光滑；2. 稳定性定理：证明了这些解在适当小的共旋转扰动下的非线性渐近稳定性。
AI.significance: 为波映射方程的有限时间爆破现象提供了具体的构造性实例，建立了自相似爆破解的稳定性理论，深化了对非线性波动方程奇点形成机制的理解。

title: A Short Survey of the Well-posedness of the Two-dimensional Burgers'   Equation
summary:
In this paper, we establish the existence and uniqueness of solutions to the
two-dimensional Burgers equation using the framework of infinite-dimensional
dynamical systems. The two-dimensional Burgers equation, which models the
interplay between nonlinear advection and viscous dissipation, is given by: $$
u_{t} + u \cdot \nabla u = \nu \Delta u + f, $$ where $ u = (u_1, u_2) $ is the
velocity field, $ \nu > 0 $ is the viscosity coefficient, and $ f $ represents
an external force. We primarily employed Galerkin method to transform the
partial differential equation into an ordinary differential equation. In
addition, by employing Sobolev spaces, energy estimates, and compactness
arguments, we rigorously prove the existence of global solutions and their
uniqueness under appropriate initial and boundary conditions.

AI.tldr: 证明了二维Burgers方程在无穷维动力系统框架下全局解的存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 二维Burgers方程描述了非线性平流与粘性耗散之间的相互作用，是流体力学中的重要模型，研究其解的存在唯一性具有基础理论意义
AI.techniques: 采用Galerkin方法将PDE转化为ODE，结合Sobolev空间理论、能量估计和紧致性论证
AI.main_theorems: 在适当的初边值条件下，严格证明了二维Burgers方程全局解的存在性和唯一性
AI.significance: 为Burgers方程的理论分析提供了严格数学基础，建立了无穷维动力系统框架下的解的存在唯一性理论，对理解流体力学中的非线性现象有重要意义

title: Viscous approximation of triangular system in 1-d with nonlinear   viscosity
summary:
We study the vanishing viscosity limit for $2\times2$ triangular system of
hyperbolic conservation laws when the viscosity coefficients are non linear. In
this article, we assume that the viscosity matrix $B(u)$ is commutating with
the convective part $A(u)$. We show the existence of global smooth solution to
the parabolic equation satisfying uniform total variation bound in
$\varepsilon$ provided that the initial data is small in $BV$. This extends the
previous result of Bianchini and Bressan [Commun. Pure Appl. Anal. (2002)]
which was considering the case $B(u)=I$.

AI.tldr: 将Bianchini和Bressan关于双曲守恒律系统粘性消失极限的结果推广到非线性粘性系数矩阵与对流部分可交换的情形
AI.motivation: 研究2×2三角形双曲守恒律系统的粘性消失极限问题，当粘性系数矩阵B(u)非线性且与对流部分A(u)可交换时，需要建立全局光滑解的存在性并得到关于ε一致的有界全变差估计
AI.techniques: 使用抛物方程的正则化方法，利用粘性矩阵与对流矩阵的可交换性条件，建立全局光滑解的存在性，并证明解的全变差关于粘性参数ε的一致有界性
AI.main_theorems: 当初值在BV空间中足够小时，抛物方程存在全局光滑解，且解的全变差关于粘性参数ε一致有界，从而推广了Bianchini和Bressan关于B(u)=I情形的结果
AI.significance: 将经典的粘性消失极限理论推广到非线性粘性系数情形，为更一般的双曲守恒律系统粘性解的存在性和稳定性分析提供了理论基础

title: Sharp multipolar $L^p$-Hardy-type inequalities on Riemannian manifolds
summary:
In this paper we prove sharp multipolar Hardy-type inequalities in the
Riemannian $L^p-$setting for $p\geq 2$ using the method of super-solutions and
fundamental results from comparison theory on manifolds, thus generalizing
previous results for $p=2$. We emphasize that when we restrict to
Cartan-Hadamard manifolds, the inequalities improve in the case $2<p<N$
compared to the case $p=2$ since we obtain positive remainder terms which are
controlled by curvature estimates. In the end, we treat the cases of positive
and negative constant sectional curvature.

AI.tldr: 证明了黎曼流形上多极Hardy型不等式的尖锐结果，推广了p=2的情形，并在Cartan-Hadamard流形上获得了改进的不等式
AI.motivation: 研究黎曼流形上的多极Hardy型不等式，推广p=2的已有结果，探索p≥2时的尖锐不等式，特别关注Cartan-Hadamard流形上的改进
AI.techniques: 使用超解方法和流形比较理论的基本结果，结合曲率估计控制余项，处理正负常截面曲率情形
AI.main_theorems: 证明了黎曼L^p-设置下(p≥2)的尖锐多极Hardy型不等式，在Cartan-Hadamard流形上对2<p<N获得带正余项的改进不等式
AI.significance: 将Hardy不等式推广到更一般的黎曼流形和p≥2情形，建立了曲率与不等式余项的定量关系，为几何分析和偏微分方程研究提供了新工具
